title: Viewing Website traffic for certain pages in a monday.com board
excerpt: I’m starting a blog on my website. I want to be able to see in a board view the traffic for each blog I write. Is there any integration with google analytics out there.  This would be nice because I could get feedback on…

posts.author: InsulationGod (Joshua Friddle)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m starting a blog on my website. I want to be able to see in a board view the traffic for each blog I write. Is there any integration with google analytics out there. This would be nice because I could get feedback on which blogs do well.

posts.author: Branetax (Alex)
posts.cookedHtml: That sounds like a great idea for keeping track of your blog traffic! I beliebe there are integrations available with platforms like Google Analytics that could help you achieve what you’re looking for.

posts.author: Branetax (Alex)
posts.cookedHtml:
By integrating Google Analytics with your Monday.com board, you should be able to view the traffic for each blog in a convenient way.
Also, if you’re interested in optimizing your blog’s performance and getting expert insights into SEO and marketing, you might find this service at https://www.upwork.com/services/product/marketing-tampa-seo-expert-audit-1750158963168546816 helpful. It could provide valuable feedback to further improve your blog’s success.
